pp-daemon._comment: Engineering squad. Wired to the pair-programmer harness daemon.

pp-codex._comment: Hydra judge plane: cross-vendor critique via PP's pp_codex MCP server. Wraps the `codex` CLI.

pp-gemini._comment: Hydra judge plane: cross-vendor critique via PP's pp_gemini MCP server. Wraps the `gemini` CLI.

hydra-memory._comment: Hydra memory fabric — episodic + semantic store as MCP resources.

executive-suite._comment: Executive squad — thin MCP over the ExecutiveSuite pack (roster, skills, commands, output persistence).

rlm-creative._comment: Garland Crown — Eight Garland Heads studio. Thin MCP over RLM-Creative (skills, commands, agents, output persistence). Repointed from RLM-CLI-Starter on 2026-05-19 when the Garland Crown source pack shipped.
